name: Corn Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and sauté until golden brown.
2. Stir in chicken broth and diced potato. Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low.
3. Simmer the mixture until the potato is tender, about 15-20 minutes.
4. Add corn and milk to the pot. Whisk well to combine.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Gently bring the chowder to a boil, then remove from heat.
7. Beat the egg in a small bowl. Stir some of the hot chowder into the beaten egg.
8. Gradually return the egg mixture to the pot, stirring constantly to avoid curdling.
9. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes until heated through.
10. Serve hot.
